name: Smart Agriculture AI System
description: An integrated machine learning system that combines irrigation prediction and pest classification to support smarter farming decisions using both environmental data and plant images.
problem: Farmers often struggle with two major challenges: determining the right irrigation schedule and identifying crop diseases early. Relying on manual judgment can lead to water wastage, reduced yield, and delayed pest detection.
solution: Developed a dual-model system where one model predicts irrigation needs based on environmental and soil data, while another model classifies plant diseases from leaf images. Both models are integrated into a single application for ease of use.
features: Irrigation prediction using structured environmental and soil data
Pest/disease classification using image-based deep learning
Combined prediction endpoint handling both data types
End-to-end preprocessing pipelines for tabular and image data
Interactive web interface for user input and results display
info: Built and integrated two machine learning models: a supervised learning model for irrigation prediction and a convolutional neural network for plant disease classification. Focused on combining multiple data modalities into a single intelligent system.
future_improvements: Integrate real-time weather data APIs for more accurate irrigation predictions
Expand pest classification model with more crop disease categories
Deploy as a full-stack mobile-friendly application
Add IoT sensor integration for real-time farm monitoring
Implement model explainability for better user trust
